author: Prophesied
text:
§4 EffectiveConfig: config VALUES layer down the trail

New `config` module folds config/balls.toml down the §12 trail (innermost/landing wins) + XDG user config + defaults, per §4 (scalar/object replace; list _prepend/_append/_ban). Wired to doctor as its consumer: resolves the layered config and reports drift when it won't parse or would break id generation.
